response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015), far short of the required 5-10 years. No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development, SQL Server/Oracle, or capital markets/fixed income domain. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not aligned with the C++/finance role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer toolchain
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far below 5-10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated Windows platform or SQL Server/Oracle experience
